global_description: A medium-sized woodpecker with a sleek, elongated body and a slightly curved bill. It features a brownish-gray plumage with black barring on the back and wings, and a distinctive black crescent on the chest. The underparts are pale with black spots, and the tail is pointed with a white rump patch visible in flight.
discriminative_attributes: Pointed tail with white rump patch

part_details.plumage: Brownish-gray with black barring on back and wings.
part_details.chest: Features a distinctive black crescent marking.
part_details.tail: Pointed with a prominent white rump patch.

spatial_relations: The black crescent is positioned on the upper chest.
The white rump patch is visible at the base of the tail during flight.
The black barring covers the back and wings.
